name: Flowerpot Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the flowerpot by washing it and lining with wax paper cut to fit. Grease again.
2. In a bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another bowl, cream butter until smooth.
4. Add sugar, eggs, and mashed bananas (2-3) to the butter mixture, blending thoroughly.
5. Combine milk and lemon juice with the banana mixture.
6. Alternately add flour and milk mixture into the butter mixture, then stir in chopped walnuts.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared flowerpot and place a removable liner inside.
8. Cover the liner with 2 to 3 paper towels.
9. Cook on low for 5-6 hours without lifting the lid. Do not peek until the last hour.
